prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy anime illustration of Kanon, a young traveling alchemist resting at a nighttime forest campsite under a deep blue starry sky. She sits on a wooden log beside a bright campfire, one knee raised, holding a wooden mug up near her face as if drinking; her face is mostly hidden by the mug and shadow. She has long blonde hair in two thick braids, wears a navy baseball cap with the visible text 0235, large blue headphones, fingerless gloves, a loose white shirt, dark blue trousers, rugged lace-up boots, belts, pouches, and a flowing dark navy cloak. Beside her floats one small round companion robot, white and metallic with a glossy black face screen, two cyan glowing oval eyes, and cyan illuminated ring details. The campsite includes one canvas teepee tent on the left, one warm lantern glowing near the tent, a wooden crate with glass alchemy bottles and flasks in the lower left, one kettle near the fire, travel bags and wooden gear on the right, and scattered warm fireflies or ember sparks in the forest. Use a rich painterly anime style with highly detailed fabric folds, leather, metal, glass reflections, warm orange firelight contrasting with cool blue moonlit shadows, atmospheric depth, dark pine trees, cozy adventurous fantasy mood, and a polished main-visual composition.
